name: EdwEdwCustSvcTaskFundFBal

text.value: SELECT CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F.SRC_SYS_CD,CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F.CUST_SVC_ID,CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F.CUST_SVC_TASK_SEQ_NO,CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F.CUST_SVC_TASK_CSTM_DTL_CD,CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F.CUST_SVC_TASK_CSTM_DTL_UNIQ_ID,CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F.CUST_SVC_TASK_RTRN_CHK_AMT INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.X123_TMP_EdwEdwCustSvcTaskFundFBal FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F FULL OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.B_CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F B_CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F ON CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F.SRC_SYS_CD = B_CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F.SRC_SYS_CD AND CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F.CUST_SVC_ID = B_CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F.CUST_SVC_ID AND CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F.CUST_SVC_TASK_SEQ_NO = B_CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F.CUST_SVC_TASK_SEQ_NO AND CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F.CUST_SVC_TASK_CSTM_DTL_CD = B_CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F.CUST_SVC_TASK_CSTM_DTL_CD AND CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F.CUST_SVC_TASK_CSTM_DTL_UNIQ_ID = B_CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F.CUST_SVC_TASK_CSTM_DTL_UNIQ_ID WHERE CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle} AND CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F.CUST_SVC_TASK_RTRN_CHK_AMT <> B_CUST_SVC_TASK_FUND_F.CUST_SVC_TASK_RTRN_CHK_AMT

SELECT TOP 1 'COLUMN SUM BALANCING IDS - EDW CUST SVC TASK FUND F OUT OF TOLERANCE' AS NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.X123_TMP_EdwEdwCustSvcTaskFundFBal_Notify FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.X123_TMP_EdwEdwCustSvcTaskFundFBal
